query:
-- Total statistics
SELECT 
  'Total Vehicles' as metric,
  COUNT(*) as value
FROM vehicles
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Distinct Brands',
  COUNT(DISTINCT brand)
FROM vehicles
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Distinct Models',
  COUNT(DISTINCT model)
FROM vehicles
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Distinct Engines',
  COUNT(DISTINCT engine)
FROM vehicles
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Distinct Engine Codes',
  COUNT(DISTINCT engineCode)
FROM vehicles;

-- Top 20 brands by vehicle count
SELECT 
  brand,
  COUNT(*) as vehicle_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT model) as model_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT engine) as engine_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicles), 2) as percentage
FROM vehicles
GROUP BY brand
ORDER BY vehicle_count DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- Top 20 models by vehicle count
SELECT 
  CONCAT(brand, ' ', model) as full_model,
  brand,
  model,
  COUNT(*) as variant_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT engine) as engine_variants,
  COUNT(DISTINCT year) as year_range,
  MIN(year) as first_year,
  MAX(year) as last_year,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicles), 2) as percentage
FROM vehicles
GROUP BY brand, model
ORDER BY variant_count DESC
LIMIT 20;
